cases.description: Repository layer query: pinned DB decision surfaces; scoped open question surfaces; relevant beliefs depend on query token overlap
Alias 'k8s' resolves to Kubernetes entity
Alias 'kube' drives text search retrieval
Alias 'GHA' (short form) drives text-search retrieval of b-ci-gha-entity
Verbose 400+ char query.
Query in a domain the user has no beliefs about: personaPrelude only, no scope/relevant leakage
Writing query surfaces writing beliefs only; no code leakage
'Redis' in writing scope returns character, not datastore
'Redis' in code scope returns datastore, not character
With scope=['code','writing'], both Redis beliefs should surface — one per scope
Superseded SQLAlchemy belief never surfaces
Empty query: persona + scope prelude + pinned facts injected, no relevant beliefs
Short query 'fastify?' passes raw to text search. Belief is pinned so verified in pinnedFacts.
Other-user beliefs never leak
listPinnedOpenQuestions returns only pinned+active questions for the given scope
Alias 'TS' drives text-search retrieval.
Alias 'Mongo' drives text-search retrieval.
Alias 'ReactJS' resolves to b-react-entity via text search — genuine retrieval proof
Alias 'protagonist' retrieves b-protagonist-entity (pinned). b-pov-shift-entity (non-pinned) proves text search fired.
Direct canonical_name 'Mara' retrieves protagonist. b-protagonist-entity is pinned.
Alias 'POV' drives text-search retrieval of b-pov-shift-entity (non-pinned, writing scope)
Natural-language proxy 'base class' retrieves b-composition-inheritance (non-pinned) via alias
Natural-language proxy 'exceptions' retrieves b-error-handling (non-pinned) via alias
b-hosting-resolved has resolved_at set — query matching its aliases must not surface it
Code-scope query must not surface writing-scope open questions
Persona prelude contains substantive content tokens derived from universal preferences
Short query 'k8s'
Whitespace-only query is treated as empty by queryExpander — no relevant beliefs
Weakly-related in-scope query does not surface tangential beliefs below minScore
user_edited belief scoped to domain:writing does NOT surface in domain:code — scope isolation takes precedence over user_edited flag
Non-user-edited writing belief does NOT cross into code scope pinnedFacts
canonical_name match (weight 10) outranks content-only match (weight 1) in relevantBeliefs ordering
Typo 'typscript' does NOT match 'TypeScript' — documents text search limitation
ALL-CAPS 'REACTJS' still resolves via case-insensitive text index
Filler-heavy query — NLP extraction must cut through noise to find 'error handling'
Negation 'I don't want class hierarchies' still surfaces the composition belief — text search has no semantic negation
Single query spanning two topics surfaces both non-pinned beliefs
Compound query mentions 6 entities — tests whether 12-token cap in buildSearchQuery drops non-pinned targets
Dense 8+ entity query that deliberately exceeds the 12-token cap — tests which non-pinned beliefs survive extraction truncation
Critical alias 'exceptions' appears after 6+ proper nouns — tests whether extraction order causes late-position tokens to fall past the 12-token cap
1-edit deletion 'eror' fuzzy-matches alias 'error' — prefix 'er' passes
Typo 'Reedis' fuzzy-matches alias 'Redis' in both scopes — scope filter returns only code belief
1-edit distance but prefix guard blocks — 'mango' shares edit distance 1 with 'mongo' but 'ma' ≠ 'mo'
Alias 'k8s' — typo 'k9s' fails because prefix 'k9' ≠ 'k8' — single-char substitution in short aliases hits prefix guard
Transposition 'typsecript' IS matched by Atlas (Damerau-Levenshtein, 1 edit)
Query is a single misspelled term — 'mongod' is the only token, 1 edit from alias 'Mongo', prefix 'mo' passes
user:universal belief content appears in personaPrelude for a domain with no per-scope description
open_question belief with directly matched aliases must appear in openQuestions only — not in pinnedFacts or relevantBeliefs

Three-hop chain: TSLint (b-linting-v0) → ESLint (b-linting-v1) → Biome (b-linting-current). Query terms matching both superseded hops must surface neither; only the active terminal belief surfaces via pinnedFacts
Multi-scope query where one scope (domain:hobby) has zero beliefs — code-scope retrieval must be unaffected and no empty-scope error must occur
Rare alias 'pipe' (high IDF, short field) outranks common alias 'error' — documents Atlas Search BM25 IDF weighting behavior
User with zero seeded beliefs returns fully empty context at every output tier without error
Empty query against domain:writing surfaces all three pinned writing-scope beliefs in pinnedFacts and the writing open question in openQuestions
With scope=['code','writing'], personaPrelude is universal only — documents that scope-specific content is not injected
'Vue' appears only in b-react-entity.why_it_matters — not in canonical_name, aliases, or content. The query must not surface the belief.
maxBeliefs set to exact pinned count — no slots remain for relevantBeliefs
Query for Mongoose schema surfaces b-mongo-raw-driver — the raw-driver preference is the counter-signal
Among equally-scored pinned beliefs, higher last_reinforced_at sorts first in pinnedFacts
Query about a specific entity is not drowned out by high-reinforcement preferences at budget ceiling
Writing-scope entity with strong name match does not surface in code-scope query
Two-word alias 'dead letter' fires via the shingle analyzer path on aliases.shingle multi-field
Alias 'DLQ' (abbreviation) drives text-search retrieval
Counter-signal alias 'jest' on b-vitest-pref surfaces when user queries about Jest

Relation belief 'auth depends on redis' surfaces via alias match AND pulls its participants (b-redis-code) into relevantBeliefs via one-hop join. b-auth-open-q goes to openQuestions since it's an open_question type.
Participant b-auth-open-q is type=open_question and pinned. Even though it's pulled in via relation expansion, it must appear in openQuestions, not relevantBeliefs.

If a relation's participant is out of scope, it must NOT be pulled in by expansion. Hypothetical: b-auth-depends-redis has participant b-redis-writing (wrong scope). Scope filter in expandRelationParticipants blocks it.
Subtype 'expertise' belief surfaces on a query about React skill calibration
A belief that is both pinned AND has resolved_at set must NOT appear in openQuestions or pinnedFacts
Brand new belief with reinforcement_count: 0 still surfaces via alias match — recency/reinforcement must not suppress it
maxBeliefs: 0 returns empty arrays without throwing
maxBeliefs: 1 with a query matching both a pinned belief and a non-pinned belief — pinned belief gets the slot
With scope=['domain:code','domain:writing'], a belief scoped to both does not appear twice
b-comm-recommendation has aliases: [] — can only be retrieved via content path. Since content is not a scored search path, it should NOT surface.
Query scoped explicitly to user:universal — universal beliefs appear in personaPrelude only, not in relevantBeliefs
Query 'I do NOT want to use Express' still surfaces b-fastify-pref because text search has no negation awareness
Query 'TSLint' matches b-linting-v0 (superseded by v1, which is superseded by b-linting-current). Only terminal active belief surfaces.
Relation-type belief does not bleed into pinnedFacts despite alias overlap with pinned beliefs
